_schema.description: Yogas are special planetary combinations that produce specific life outcomes. They override individual planet readings when present.
_schema.usage: Detect these patterns in chart - they greatly enhance or reduce planetary effects.

ruchaka_yoga.formation: Mars in own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exaltation (Capricorn) in angular house (1, 4, 7, 10)
predictions: success in military, sports, surgery, real estate

bhadra_yoga.formation: Mercury in own sign (Gemini/Virgo) in angular house (1, 4, 7, 10)

hamsa_yoga.formation: Jupiter in own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exaltation (Cancer) in angular house (1, 4, 7, 10)

malavya_yoga.formation: Venus in own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exaltation (Pisces) in angular house (1, 4, 7, 10)

shasha_yoga.formation: Saturn in own sign (Capricorn/Aquarius) or exaltation (Libra) in angular house (1, 4, 7, 10)
predictions: rises through hard work to high position

gajakesari_yoga.formation: Jupiter and Moon in angular relationship (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th from each other)

neecha_bhanga_raja_yoga.formation: Debilitated planet has its debilitation 'cancelled' by certain conditions (e.g., lord of debilitation sign in angle)
predictions: starts with disadvantage but rises to greatness

vipreet_raja_yoga.formation: Lords of dusthana houses (6, 8, 12) exchange or sit in each other's houses

kemadruma_yoga.formation: Moon has no planet in 2nd or 12th from it (except Sun, Rahu, Ketu)
kemadruma_yoga.tone: lonely, struggling - but can be remedied
kemadruma_yoga.remedies: Moon mantras, Monday fasting, pearl gemstone, support for mother

manglik_dosha.formation: Mars in houses 1, 4, 7, 8, or 12 from Ascendant or Moon
predictions: harm to spouse possible if severe
manglik_dosha.remedies: Marrying another Manglik often cancels; Mars worship; Hanuman chalisa; Tuesday fasting

kalsarpa_yoga.formation: All 7 traditional planets between Rahu and Ketu axis
kalsarpa_yoga.remedies: Naga puja, Rahu-Ketu mantras, spiritual practices

predictions: potential for false gurus or being led astray
guru_chandal_yoga.tone: questioning, unconventional, confused but potentially original

saraswati_yoga.formation: Jupiter, Venus, Mercury together in angle, trine, or 2nd house
predictions: fame through writing, music, or arts

lakshmi_yoga.formation: Lord of 9th house in own/exalted sign in angle/trine with Venus or Jupiter

parivartana_yoga.formation: Two planets exchange signs (lord of sign A in sign B, lord of sign B in sign A)
themes: strong connection between two life areas
predictions: two areas of life deeply linked
favorable if benefic houses, challenging if dusthanas

viparita_raja_yoga.formation: Lord of 6th in 8th or 12th; or lord of 8th in 6th or 12th; or lord of 12th in 6th or 8th

amala_yoga.formation: Benefic planet in 10th from Moon or Lagna

budha_aditya_yoga.formation: Sun and Mercury conjunct (when Mercury not combust)

shakat_yoga.tone: unstable, fluctuating - can be remedied by Jupiter strength
